subcodes.first_line: The intention of "first-born son" referreth to the eldest surviving male offspring; it embraceth not the eldest female, even should she be the senior among the children [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود از ولد بکر ارشد اولاد ذکور باقی است شمول بأرشد اناث ندارد ولو اکبر اناث باشد
subcodes.subjects: @law of inheritance, @rights of the eldest son; primogeniture, @firmness in the Covenant
